seoTitle: Kellyville vs Kellyville Ridge — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kellyville and Kellyville Ridge. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kellyville vs Kellyville Ridge: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kellyville and Kellyville Ridge.
heading: Kellyville vs Kellyville Ridge — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kellyville, New South Wales and Kellyville Ridge, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kellyville has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Kellyville Ridge (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kellyville or Kellyville Ridge safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kellyville has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Kellyville Ridge scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kellyville scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Kellyville Ridge scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kellyville or Kellyville Ridge?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kellyville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
